channel.title: Problem server side render and html2react
channel.description: I have been trying html2react and I have problems on the server "document is not defined", but the flexibility to modify the html is awesome :star_struck:

item.title: Problem server side render and html2react
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
I think you found our previous html2react package.

We haven’t adapted yet to the new version of the framework but it’s one of the things we want to do in June before the 1.0 release

Read full topic
item.source: Problem server side render and html2react

item.title: Problem server side render and html2react
item.dc:creator: jesus.designer
item.description:
I have been trying html2react and I have problems on the server “document is not defined”, but the flexibility to modify the html is awesome

Read full topic
item.source: Problem server side render and html2react
